name: Tenant improvements (short life)
examples: Removable partitions, millwork, specialty lighting, branded fit-out.

name: Process and specialty equipment
examples: Restaurant kitchen equipment, lab equipment, retail POS (vertical-dependent).

name: Site work and paving
examples: Parking, sidewalks, retaining walls, site concrete.

name: Landscaping and exterior lighting
examples: Landscaping, irrigation, exterior lighting, monument signage.

name: Building shell
examples: Foundation, structure, roof, exterior envelope, fire-rated assemblies.

name: Core building systems
examples: HVAC, plumbing, electrical distribution, fire suppression, elevators.

name: Permanent interior finishes
examples: Attached ceilings, built-in millwork, hard-tile restrooms, permanent wall finishes.
